name: Reference
description: This is a reference for the objects below, not a variant. Each field is an example or description of its content.
location: The line range where the component is located (e.g. #L10-L20 means the component is between line 10 and 20). The range may not be exact, so leave a margin of error.

name: Multi-column primary
description: Footer section with multi-column footer with primary nav and utility links.

name: Minimal centered
description: Footer section with centered minimal footer with reduced links and compact spacing.

name: Newsletter + links
description: Footer section with footer combining newsletter signup and grouped navigation links.

name: Simple one-line
description: Footer section with single-line footer row for copyright and compact links.

name: Top-rounded
description: Footer section with footer container with rounded top corners and boxed treatment.
